Policy / Note: Mandatory before proposal is drafted for any prospect
Industry segment and company size determine analysis scope
Segment drives which competitor registry is queried
Covers direct and indirect competitors in the segment
Includes service offering overlap and known pricing positioning
Strengths relevant to the specific prospect's needs
Weaknesses become differentiators in the proposal
Report must cover at least three competitors
Triggers proposal drafting step in lead-to-client-conversion process
Proposal framing updated based on competitive gaps identified
